records.question: Which races had a qualifying Q1 time of exactly 1:13.550 and involved constructors with at least 0 wins?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings ON races.raceid = constructorstandings.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE qualifying.q1 = '1:13.550' AND constructorstandings.wins >= 0
records.pred_sql: select distinct races.raceid from races join qualifying on races.raceid = qualifying.raceid join constructorStandings on qualifying.raceid = constructorStandings.raceid and qualifying.constructorid = constructorStandings.constructorid where qualifying.q1 = '1:13.550' and constructorStandings.wins >= 0 limit 5;
records.thought: I need to find races where the qualifying Q1 time is exactly '1:13.550' and the constructor involved has at least 0 wins. I will join qualifying with constructorStandings to check the wins condition and then select the race IDs.

records.question: Which races start exactly at 12:00:00 and take place at circuits with a longitude of at most -1.01694?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE races.time = '12:00:00' AND circuits.lng <= -1.01694
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join circuits on races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid where races.time = '12:00:00' and circuits.lng <= -1.01694 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races that start exactly at '12:00:00' and join with circuits to filter those with longitude less than or equal to -1.01694.

records.question: Which races held at Aut_dromo Jo Carlos Pace in Ṣo Paulo, with a round number of at least 2, had a driver finishing exactly 4th position who completed no more than 40 laps, earned at most 3.0 points, had a time of +1:40.13, and a position order of at least 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
WHERE circuits.name = 'Aut_dromo Jo Carlos Pace' AND circuits.location = 'Ṣo Paulo' AND results.time = '+1:40.13' AND results.positionorder >= 4 AND results.laps <= '40' AND results.points <= 3.0 AND races.round >= 2 AND results.position = '4'
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join circuits on races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid join results on races.raceid = results.raceid where lower(circuits.name) like '%autódromo josé carlos pace%' and lower(circuits.location) like '%são paulo%' and races.round >= 2 and results.position = 4 and results.laps <= 40 and results.points <= 3.0 and results.time = '+1:40.13' and results.positionorder >= 4 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races held at Autódromo José Carlos Pace in São Paulo with round >= 2, join results to find drivers finishing 4th with laps <= 40, points <= 3.0, time '+1:40.13', and positionOrder >= 4.

records.question: Which races took place in round 3 at the Bahrain International Circuit located in Sakhir, Bahrain, with latitude at most 26.0325, longitude exactly 50.5106, and the circuit URL exactly http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bahrain_International_Circuit?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.lat <= 26.0325 AND circuits.location = 'Sakhir' AND circuits.country = 'Bahrain' AND races.round = 3 AND circuits.lng = 50.5106 AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bahrain_International_Circuit'
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join circuits on races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid where races.round = 3 and lower(circuits.name) like '%bahrain international circuit%' and lower(circuits.location) like '%sakhir%' and lower(circuits.country) like '%bahrain%' and circuits.lat <= 26.0325 and circuits.lng = 50.5106 and circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bahrain_International_Circuit' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races by round 3 and join with circuits to match the Bahrain International Circuit with the specified location, latitude, longitude, and URL conditions.

records.question: Which races named German Grand Prix took place exactly on 1987-07-26 and were held in round 8 or earlier during years no later than 1987?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
WHERE races.date = '1987-07-26' AND races.round <= 8 AND races.name = 'German Grand Prix' AND races.year <= 1987
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races where lower(name) like '%german grand prix%' and date = '1987-07-26' and round <= 8 and year <= 1987 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races by name containing 'german grand prix', date exactly '1987-07-26', round less than or equal to 8, and year less than or equal to 1987.

records.question: Which races took place at the Okayama International Circuit in Okayama with a circuit reference exactly okayama and longitude at most 134.221, where the driver finished exactly 23rd and the qualifying position was exactly 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN driverstandings ON races.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE circuits.circuitref = 'okayama' AND circuits.location = 'Okayama' AND circuits.name = 'Okayama International Circuit' AND driverstandings.position = 23 AND circuits.lng <= 134.221 AND qualifying.position = 11
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join circuits on races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid join results on races.raceid = results.raceid join qualifying on races.raceid = qualifying.raceid and results.driverid = qualifying.driverid where lower(circuits.name) like '%okayama international circuit%' and circuits.circuitref = 'okayama' and circuits.lng <= 134.221 and results.positionorder = 23 and qualifying.position = 11 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races held at the Okayama International Circuit with circuitRef 'okayama' and longitude <= 134.221, join results to find drivers finishing 23rd, and join qualifying to find drivers qualifying 11th for the same race and driver.

records.question: Which races named 'San Marino Grand Prix' that occurred in the year 1995 on the date '1995-04-30' as round 3 and that have related constructor standings and qualifying records where the qualifying position is exactly 12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN constructorstandings ON races.raceid = constructorstandings.raceid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND races.year = 1995 AND qualifying.position = 12 AND races.date = '1995-04-30' AND races.round = 3
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join constructorStandings on races.raceid = constructorStandings.raceid join qualifying on races.raceid = qualifying.raceid where lower(races.name) like '%san marino grand prix%' and races.year = 1995 and races.date = '1995-04-30' and races.round = 3 and qualifying.position = 12 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races by name, year, date, and round, then join with constructorStandings and qualifying to ensure related records exist and qualifying position is exactly 12.

records.question: Which British Grand Prix races in the UK took place on or after July 10, 2016, and were held in the year 2016 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE races.date >= '2016-07-10' AND circuits.country = 'UK' AND races.year >= 2016 AND races.name = 'British Grand Prix'
records.pred_sql: select races.raceid from races join circuits on races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid where lower(races.name) like '%british grand prix%' and lower(circuits.country) like '%uk%' and races.date >= '2016-07-10' and races.year >= 2016 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter races held in the UK with 'British Grand Prix' in the name, date on or after 2016-07-10, and year 2016 or later.

records.question: Which races took place on 1974-04-28 where the name is exactly Spanish Grand Prix?
